title: LE16 9RP, VIDA Bioenergy Wormslade Ltd: environmental permit issued - EPR/HP3327LY/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit for:    Operator name: VIDA Bioenergy Wormslade Ltd   Installation name: Wormslade Green Energy AD Plant   Permit number: EPR/HP3327LY/A001   "
